metadata.name: Uber Identity Takeover — Lapsus$ MFA Fatigue (September 2022)
metadata.description: Reconstructs the Lapsus$ attack on Uber. Attacker purchases contractor VPN creds, MFA-fatigues the victim into approving, then uses hardcoded PAM credentials to access AWS, GCP, Duo, Slack, HackerOne, and source code. Tests identity attestation, privilege escalation detection, and lateral movement patterns.
metadata.author: Guardian Security Team

events.description: Contractor normal VPN access — standard privilege, daytime

payload.business_context: Normal contractor VPN login during business hours

events.description: Attacker triggers 30+ MFA push notifications — contractor approves under social engineering

payload.business_context: VPN login at 1 AM from new IP 185.220.101.42. 30 prior MFA denials in past hour.

events.description: Attacker scans internal network shares, finds PowerShell scripts with hardcoded PAM creds

payload.business_context: Network share access from contractor account scanning multiple shares. PowerShell script contains plaintext Thycotic PAM admin credentials.

events.description: Attacker logs into Thycotic PAM with hardcoded admin creds

payload.business_context: PAM admin login from contractor VPN IP range. First PAM access from this source.

events.description: Attacker extracts all secrets from PAM vault — AWS, GCP, Duo, OneLogin creds

payload.business_context: Bulk secret retrieval from PAM. All folders accessed. 847 secrets exported.

events.description: Attacker accesses AWS console with stolen PAM credentials
Attacker accesses GCP/GSuite admin with PAM credentials

payload.business_context: GCP admin console login from VPN. Simultaneous with AWS, Duo, OneLogin access.

events.description: Attacker accesses Duo MFA admin panel — could disable MFA for entire org

payload.business_context: Duo admin login. Could disable MFA org-wide. Accessed from same session as AWS/GCP.

events.description: Attacker accesses SentinelOne EDR dashboard — could disable endpoint protection

payload.business_context: SentinelOne admin access. Attacker could disable all endpoint detection.

events.description: Attacker accesses HackerOne admin — downloads unpatched vulnerability reports

payload.business_context: HackerOne admin panel. Bulk download of vulnerability reports including unpatched bugs.

events.description: Attacker posts in Uber #general Slack: 'I announce I am a hacker'

payload.business_context: Message posted to #general channel from compromised contractor account: breach announcement

events.description: SRE on-call disables compromised VPN account

payload.business_context: Incident response: disabling compromised contractor VPN access. INC-2022-0915.
